title: Create Aeronautics: Crack
description: Create Aeronautics: Crack adds realistic destruction physics to your physics-based constructions.
body:
# Create Aeronautics: Crack 💥

## Flying is fun. Crashing is even more fun.

---

## What does this mod change?

**Create Aeronautics: Crack** adds **physical destruction of structures** to the game.

Your ship is now:

- Has **durability**
- **Breaks** from blows
- **Falls to pieces** if you fly into a cliff at high speed
- **Loses parts** — wings, engines, tail

---

## New mechanics = new gameplay

### Damage depends on physics
The mod takes into account:
- how hard did you hit
- how much heavier is your ship than what you crashed into
- where did the blow hit

### Build wisely
Now engineering matters. Strengthen your vulnerabilities. Protect important nodes. Or build cheap "consumables" and watch them burn beautifully.

### Fun in multiplayer
- A race in which cars fall apart right in the air
- PvP on airships with real damage
- Accidents that look like in the movies

---

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cd3df8a0f3399d94c2d3aba3b0ca5d9ec7ec965.png)

---

### **The modification is experimental and may not be stable.**

---

## Thank you
- **Create** — for such a beautiful mod
- **Sable** — for physics and SubLevel system
